items.title: Bluesky is getting ‘communities’
items.summary: Bluesky will be getting "communities," which will function as smaller spaces where you can "go deeper and hang out with people who care about the same stuff" sometime this year,...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Windows 11 sucks slightly less now, thanks to a June update
items.summary: The update brings a low-latency profile, speeds up search, and patches hundreds of flaws.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
items.summary: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
